playlist_strategy: A progressive high-BPM journey. Begins with a focused euphoric buildup, transitioning into aggressive rawstyle for heavy lifting peaks, sustaining with energetic Frenchcore, and wrapping up with a potent but melodic cool-down.

tracks.title: Awakening Pulse
tracks.youtube_title: Awakening Pulse ⚡ Euphoric Hardstyle Warmup | Get Focused
tracks.style_prompt: Euphoric Hardstyle, 145 BPM, F Minor. Driving distorted kick, atmospheric cinematic strings, and soaring detuned supersaw melodies. Strong cinematic rise intro within the first 5 seconds. High-fidelity electronic production.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of an athletic woman putting on headphones in a dark gym. Intense focus in her eyes. Neon blue rim light against dark greys. Shallow depth of field, high contrast.
tracks.youtube_description: Kickstart your gym session with Awakening Pulse! 🔥 This euphoric hardstyle track creates the perfect atmospheric build-up to get you in the zone. Let the sweeping melodies fuel your focus. 🎧 #hardstyle #gymmusic #workoutmotivation #euphorichardstyle

tracks.title: Iron Resolve
tracks.youtube_title: Iron Resolve 😤 Hardstyle Bass Grip | Unleash Potential
tracks.style_prompt: Reverse Bass Hardstyle, 150 BPM, G Minor. Punchy hard kick driving into an iconic rolling reverse bassline. Aggressive acid synth textures. Immediate bass groove intro. Hi-fi modern low-end production.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a muscular arm gripping a barbell tightly. Chalk dust visible in the air. Gritty acid green lighting cutting through pitch black. High tension, very sharp focus.
tracks.youtube_description: Activate your muscles with Iron Resolve! 😤 A ruthless reverse bass hardstyle anthem designed to push your limits. Feel the relentless groove power you through every single rep. 🟢 #reversebass #hardstyle #liftingmusic #gymgrind

tracks.title: Adrenaline Spikes
tracks.youtube_title: Adrenaline Spikes 🚀 Raw Hardstyle | Explosive Energy
tracks.style_prompt: Raw Hardstyle, 155 BPM, C Minor. Brutal raw kicks and piercing screech synths. Heavy distorted sub-bass layer. Starts with a devastatingly punchy drum intro. Dark, aggressive, and industrial atmosphere.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a determined male athlete mid-deadlift. Veins popping, aggressive expression. Immersed in deep blood-red cinematic lighting with heavy shadows. Raw intensity.
tracks.youtube_description: Hit your absolute peak with Adrenaline Spikes! 🚀 Unforgiving raw hardstyle with explosive kicks and dark synths. When the weight gets heavy, this is the track that refuses to let you quit. 🩸 #rawstyle #hardstyle #deadlift #gymrage

tracks.title: Limit Breaker
tracks.youtube_title: Limit Breaker 🤯 Hardcore Workout Anthem | Push Harder
tracks.style_prompt: Mainstream Hardcore, 160 BPM, D# Minor. Distorted gabber kicks driving under a fast, uplifting hard trance lead. Frantic hi-hats. Opens instantly with an infectious synth riff hook. Huge stadium-filling sound.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of an athlete letting out a triumphant roar during a heavy sled push. Sweat flying. Bold electric purple backlighting with gold rim highlights. Epic, dramatic fitness shot.
tracks.youtube_description: Shatter your barriers with Limit Breaker! 🤯 High-velocity 160 BPM mainstream hardcore built for extreme HIIT sessions. Let the driving tempo push your heart rate and your endurance to the max! 💜 #hardcore #hiit #hardstyle #limitbreaker

tracks.title: Titan's Domain
tracks.youtube_title: Titan's Domain 🔨 The Heaviest Gym Music | Xtra Raw
tracks.style_prompt: Xtra Rawstyle, 158 BPM, A Minor. Ultra-heavy distorted zaagkicks, metallic percussion hits, and dissonant industrial stabs. Starts immediately with drum kicks that hit like a sledgehammer. Destructive and chaotic.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, strict close-up on heavy steel weight plates loaded on a bar, a chalked hand gripping it. Very rugged industrial environment. Harsh bright orange Sparks and steel-blue shadows. Hyper-masculine.
tracks.youtube_description: Enter the Titan's Domain. 🔨 This is Xtra Raw hardstyle for your heaviest 1RM attempts. Absolutely brutal kicks and chaotic metallic drops. Only for the most hardcore lifters seeking ultimate dominance! ⛓️ #xtraraw #hardstyle #1rm #heavyweights

tracks.title: Cardio Overdrive
tracks.youtube_title: Cardio Overdrive 🏃 Frenchcore Speed Session | Never Stop
tracks.style_prompt: Frenchcore, 200 BPM, E Minor. Hyper-fast triplet kicks with a bouncy offbeat bassline. Uplifting and frantic melodies. Explodes into a rapid bass groove intro immediately. Crystal clear high-end commercial mix.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, mid-shot of a female runner sprinting on a treadmill, motion blur on the edges to show immense speed. Lit with vibrant neon pink and cyan lights in a dark room. Sweaty and energized.
tracks.youtube_description: Push your cardio to the absolute limit! 🏃‍♀️ Cardio Overdrive brings 200 BPM Frenchcore energy to keep your feet moving and your lungs burning. Perfect for intense treadmill sprints! 💨 #frenchcore #runmusic #cardioworkout #200bpm

tracks.title: Unbreakable Will
tracks.youtube_title: Unbreakable Will ⚔️ Epic Hardstyle Anthem | Beast Mode
tracks.style_prompt: Orchestral Hardstyle, 150 BPM, D Minor. Huge cinematic brass and choir layered over devastating pitched hardstyle kicks. Massive melodic lead synth. Starts with an epic cinematic rise intro. Monumental and heroic atmosphere.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, heroic low-angle medium shot of a muscular man mid-squat. Sweat gleaming like armor. Dramatic golden hour lighting cutting into deep cinematic shadows. Looks like an epic battle.
tracks.youtube_description: Channel your inner warrior with Unbreakable Will. ⚔️ An epic fusion of cinematic orchestral elements and crushing hardstyle kicks. Built for those grueling endurance sets where backing down is not an option! 😤 #epichardstyle #beastmode #squatday

tracks.title: Rhythm of the Iron
tracks.youtube_title: Rhythm of the Iron ⚙️ Hardstyle Bounce | Keep Moving
tracks.style_prompt: Early Hardstyle/Jumpstyle, 140 BPM, B Minor. Bouncy hollow kicks with deep FM bass. Very syncopated rhythm. Strong, catchy, and repetitive bass groove intro out of the gate. Upbeat and highly rhythm-focused.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close up of gym cabled weight stacks mid-motion. High rhythm and repetitive geometry. Lit with striking yellow accents against polished silver chrome. Sharp and high-contrast.
tracks.youtube_description: Find your flow state on the machines! ⚙️ Rhythm of the Iron delivers a bouncy, classic early hardstyle vibe. Keep your tempo perfect and your muscles engaged all the way to the end of your circuit. 💪 #earlyhardstyle #gymcircuit #workoutbounce

tracks.title: Coolant Flush
tracks.youtube_title: Coolant Flush 🧊 Melodic Hardstyle | Gym Cooldown
tracks.style_prompt: Melodic Hardstyle, 145 BPM, C# Minor. Softer, slightly muffled hard kicks underneath lush reverb pianos and beautiful arps. Intro starts with a gorgeous melodic synth riff. Emotional, uplifting, and spacious.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium shot of an athlete sitting on a gym bench, wiping sweat with a towel, looking proud and relieved. Cool, relaxing icy blue side lighting. Soft white background glow, relaxed atmosphere.
tracks.youtube_description: You survived the session! 🧊 Now bring your heart rate down with Coolant Flush. This emotional melodic hardstyle track is designed for your post-workout stretch and recovery. Reflect on your gains! 🧘‍♂️ #melodichardstyle #gymcooldown #workoutrecovery

tracks.title: Echoes of the Arena
tracks.youtube_title: Echoes of the Arena 🌌 Ambient Hardstyle | Post Workout Reflection
tracks.style_prompt: Ambient Hardstyle, 130 BPM, A# Minor. Very slow tempo with massive, atmospheric ambient pads and ethereal chimes over a distant, heavily reverberated distorted kick. Cinematic rise intro. Dreamy and triumphant.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, wide shot of an athlete walking out of the gym doors at sunset. Silhouette against a gorgeous deep purple and sunset orange sky. Peaceful, victorious, cinematic composition.
tracks.youtube_description: Walk out a champion. 🌌 Echoes of the Arena blends massive atmospheric ambient pads with distant, deep hardstyle kicks. The perfect soundtrack for your drive home after conquering the weights. 🚗💪 #ambienthardstyle #postworkout #gymvibes
